title: Simply Crystals
description: Colorful, simple and perfect for pvp? This pack has it all!
body:
### Simply Crystals
Reimagine your survival and cpvp experience with colorful end crystals!\
![ALT Text](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/TAWHUypT/images/dbee0f0bee638d1bc3fd40afa6b2bbba5cfbdac4.png)

- - -
<details>
<summary>Showcase with shaders</summary>

![No shaders](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/TAWHUypT/images/141dbac5634f471ff80e77386692abfc8f3cb614.png)
No shaders
---

![AstraLex](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/TAWHUypT/images/f85354f21054b0195891725031275cb789ec64f8.png)

---

![Complementary Reimagined](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/TAWHUypT/images/22e942804596c98202fd21631a6138dc373ee3d3.png)
Complementary Reimagined

- - -

### Dependecies

This pack requires [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) or [Optifine](https://www.optifine.net/home)!

### Contribute

Want to improve the pack?\
Or just a place to chat?\
Then make sure to join my discord server!
